   "source": [
    "# フィッティング: 基本\n",
    "\n",
    "**目的**: 通常最小二乗法（OLS）および一般化最小二乗法（GLS）を使用して GW データにモデルをフィットする方法を学びます。\n",
    "\n",
    "GWexpy は主要な最適化エンジンとして **iminuit** を使用し、相関を持つスペクトルデータ用の特化したコスト関数を提供します。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3a759f53",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.01163,
     "end_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:26.532949+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:26.521319+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 1. 単純な OLS フィット\n",
    "\n",
    "対角誤差（OLS）を使った単純なべき乗則フィットから始めます。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "2cde139e",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-28T02:25:26.553053Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-28T02:25:26.552866Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.542027Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.538705Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 10.006959,
     "end_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.548142+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:26.541183+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Fitted a=2.00, b=10.22\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=UserWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.fitting import fit_series\n",
    "\n",
    "# Generate synthetic data\n",
    "freqs = np.linspace(10, 100, 50)\n",
    "model = lambda f, a, b: a * f + b\n",
    "y_true = model(freqs, 2.0, 10.0)\n",
    "y_obs = y_true + np.random.normal(0, 2, size=len(freqs))\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.frequencyseries import FrequencySeries\n",
    "\n",
    "psd = FrequencySeries(y_obs, frequencies=freqs)\n",
    "\n",
    "res = fit_series(psd, model, p0={\"a\": 1.0, \"b\": 1.0})\n",
    "\n",
    "res.plot()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "print(f\"Fitted a={res.params['a']:.2f}, b={res.params['b']:.2f}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "0fd19882",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.012216,
     "end_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.622101+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.609885+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 2. 一般化最小二乗法（GLS）\n",
    "\n",
    "データ点が相関している場合（例：重なり窓を使った PSD 推定）、共分散行列 $\\Sigma$ を使用します。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "e55baf8a",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.662573Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.662064Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.689338Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.688681Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.054459,
     "end_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.692432+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.637973+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "<ValueView a=2.000253045617476 b=10.217053560894843>\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from iminuit import Minuit\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.fitting import GeneralizedLeastSquares\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create a dummy covariance matrix\n",
    "cov = np.eye(len(freqs)) * 4.0\n",
    "cov_inv = np.linalg.inv(cov)\n",
    "\n",
    "# 1. Define Cost Function\n",
    "cost = GeneralizedLeastSquares(freqs, y_obs, cov_inv, model, cov=cov)\n",
    "\n",
    "# 2. Initialize and Run Minuit\n",
    "m = Minuit(cost, a=1.0, b=1.0)\n",
    "m.migrad()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(m.values)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "da3becc0",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.008657,
     "end_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.720764+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.712107+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 3. 高レベル統合パイプライン\n",
    "\n",
    "実際の解析では、ブートストラップ法を使ってデータ自体から共分散行列を推定することが多いです。GWexpy はこのための統合パイプラインを提供しています。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "2f742690",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.736207Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.735956Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-28T02:25:52.371573Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-28T02:25:52.370154Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 15.644144,
     "end_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:52.372409+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:36.728265+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x600 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from gwexpy.fitting.highlevel import fit_bootstrap_spectrum\n",
    "from gwexpy.noise.wave import colored\n",
    "\n",
    "# Generate 10 seconds of pink noise\n",
    "data = colored(duration=10, sample_rate=256, exponent=0.5, amplitude=1e-21)\n",
    "\n",
    "def power_law(f, A, alpha):\n",
    "    return A * f**alpha\n",
    "\n",
    "result = fit_bootstrap_spectrum(\n",
    "    data,\n",
    "    model_fn=power_law,\n",
    "    freq_range=(10, 100),\n",
    "    fftlength=1.0,\n",
    "    overlap=0.5,\n",
    "    initial_params={\"A\": 1e-21, \"alpha\": -0.5},\n",
    "    plot=True\n",
    ")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d16c2434",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.010087,
     "end_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:52.414259+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-28T02:25:52.404172+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 4. 演習\n",
    "\n",
    "1. **パラメータ制約**: `fit_series` の `limits` 引数を使って `a > 0` となるよう OLS フィットを修正してください。\n",
    "2. **MCMC**: セクション 3 で `run_mcmc=True` を設定して MCMC を有効にしてください（`emcee` が必要）。"
   ]
  },

   "id": "c1a615b8",
   "metadata": {
